title: Soulful Nether
description: Soulful Nether is a small project that focuses on making the nether a bit more nice!
body:
This is Soulful Nether, a mod that is workin' to upgrade the nether

## What does it do?
Soulful Nether adds a Fright Forest, the Fright Forest is a netherwart forest based in the Soul Sand Valley;
  
The second current biome is the Ashen Deltas, its what would happen if the basalt deltas were based in souls (Looks like ive got a theme starting),

The third biome is the Gloomy Glades, a Warped Forest sub-biome with a yellow/cyan theme and no souls to be found

Soulful Nether also adds Soulroots! you get them from planting beetroots in Soul Sand/Soul Soil or Lichoss

And our first mob; the Bone Wyrm!

## Will you port to X version?
I most likely wont be porting my mod for a while, though it's something I'm interested in doing

## What are you planning?
well, I'm planning on making compat in the future for stuff like more Soulroot Foods!

## Compat!
Currently the existing compat is:                               

Farmers Delight (adding Soulroot Crates of every type)                             

Jadens Nether Expansion (adding Frostbitten Soulroots and Frostbitten Popsicles)     


## And credits!
[ThatJadenXgamer](https://x.com/ThatJadenXgamer) - help on some Mixins, Java classes, and ideas

[DigitalPear](https://modrinth.com/user/digitalpear) - help on Terrablender dependancy setup and some Mixins
